bullets.text: Saudi Arabia must recognize Israel for a nuclear deal to proceed, according to former US President Trump, linking the landmark agreement to the Abraham Accords.
Yemen's Houthis have attacked a Saudi tanker and claimed to hit another vessel, following their announcement of a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.
Two Russian men were jailed in Angola on charges of terrorism and spying, convicted over an alleged plan to stage a coup and organize demonstrations.
A 52-year-old man has been charged in Queensland for allegedly posting fake sexualized images of women, including their full names, in public places across south-east Queensland over five years.
ACT Labor is facing a significant reckoning following Yvette Berry's resignation, marking a critical moment for a government that has been in power for nearly 25 years.
Adelaide has become the fourth most expensive capital for buying a house, with median property prices rising 4.8 percent in the June quarter, bucking national housing trends.
Intel's shares surged after the chipmaker reported its fastest growth in 15 years, with revenue increasing by 25% in the second quarter.
Oil prices have reached $100 per barrel for the first time since May, while US stocks experienced a slide amidst rising Middle East tensions and concerns over the profitability of AI investments.
Short sellers in Tesla Inc. have profited by $4 billion as the company's stock experienced a significant decline, contributing to the S&P 500's worst day in a month.
